scene: Crude black-marker hand-drawn doodle, full 9:16 vertical composition, clean white background, black linework with selective pop color, matching the main episode's style, drawn to fill the tall frame. A round-headed stick-figure man hunched at a slot machine, glazed and absorbed, a half-finished drink on a small stand beside him, the machine glowing. Quiet and slightly eerie. No text.

Crude black-marker hand-drawn doodle, full 9:16 vertical composition, clean white background, black linework with selective pop color, matching the main episode's style, drawn to fill the tall frame. Closer on the same man's face, eyes glassy and hypnotized, staring blankly into the machine's glow, completely lost. No text.

Crude black-marker hand-drawn doodle, full 9:16 vertical composition, clean white background, black linework with selective pop color, matching the main episode's style, drawn to fill the tall frame. Pulled back to reveal the room around him: a casino floor with no clock, a bare wall where a clock should be, no windows, slot machines all around, the man small and alone in the middle. Eerie, closed-in, engineered. No text.

Crude black-marker hand-drawn doodle, full 9:16 vertical composition, clean white background, black linework with selective pop color, matching the main episode's style, drawn to fill the tall frame. A different person slumped on a couch at night, glazed and hypnotized, glued to a glowing smartphone, the exact same blank expression as the casino man. The same trap, at home. No text.
